NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76265151) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENNETT, SAMANTHA HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JUNE-02-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SAMANTHA BENNETT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT; PLAINTIFF SAMANTHA BENNETT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE THE PROPOSED FAC WITHIN ONE WEEK OF THIS ORDER. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING WITH A COVER LETTER DEMONSTRATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SAMANTHA BENNETT's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Samantha Bennett's motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted.

Plaintiff shall file the proposed FAC within one week of this order.

(See word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Set For Trial On Aug-18-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
